ddls:
CREATE TABLE "controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control */,
  "control_type" TEXT /* Type of control (e.g., Linear Control, On/Off Control) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowable value for the control */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowable value for the control */,
  "flags" TEXT /* Operational flags related to the control */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the control */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the control */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the control (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the control this signal is associated with */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of signal (e.g., Edge, Level) */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Operation to perform based on the signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the signal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the signal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the signal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the signal (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_id") REFERENCES controls ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the operation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the operation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the operation (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operational_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the operational flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag's purpose */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the flag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the flag */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flag (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_operations" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the control being linked */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation being linked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the association (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id", "operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Operator, Engineer, Admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has this permission */,
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the control to which the permission applies */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., Read, Write, Execute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the permission (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_id") REFERENCES controls ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the control on which the operation was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the operation */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the operation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., processed, pending) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the operation (e.g., error messages, success messages) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_logs_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_id") REFERENCES controls ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state entry */,
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the control whose state is recorded */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the control */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the state was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the state entry (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_states_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_id") REFERENCES controls ("control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the control type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the control type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the control type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the control type (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal level */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated signal */,
  "level_value" REAL /* Value of the signal level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the signal level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the signal level */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the signal level (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_levels_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_operations" (
  "signal_operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal operation */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the signal related to the operation */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operation being executed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the signal operation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the signal operation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the signal operation (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_operations_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_operations_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)
